metadata.siteDescription: Create, organize, and share your formula sheets and cheat sheets with FormulaBase. Use the advanced editor and AI assistant to generate formulas and notes in seconds.

hero.subtitle: The complete platform to create, organize, and share scientific formula sheets. Write in LaTeX, generate with AI, split content into chapters, and share through QR codes or links.

videoDemo.title: Everything you need
videoDemo.description: We combined creation, organization, and sharing in a single interface.

slides.label: 01 - Create formula sheet
slides.title: Keep all your formulas in one place
slides.description: Create a formula sheet for every subject or exam. From physics to chemistry, everything stays organized and close at hand.

slides.label: 02 - Create chapter
slides.title: Structure your formula sheet with chapters
slides.description: Organize formulas into topic-based chapters. For example "Mechanics", "Thermodynamics", or "Electromagnetism".

slides.label: 03 - Create topic
slides.title: Group formulas by topic
slides.description: Inside each chapter, create focused topics to keep your formulas neatly organized.

slides.label: 04 - The editor
slides.title: Write formulas in LaTeX with live preview
slides.description: Write formulas in LaTeX and preview them in real time as you type. The editor also supports plain text, headings, lists, and more.

slides.label: 05 - Generate with AI
slides.title: Let AI build the formula sheet for you
slides.description: Describe the topic and AI automatically generates the relevant formulas with explanations, ready to be added.

slides.label: 06 - QR sharing
slides.title: Share your formula sheet with a QR code
slides.description: Generate a QR code for your formula sheet and share it with classmates. Just scan it with a phone to open it.

features.title: Everything your formula sheets need
features.description: A tool designed for students, teachers, and researchers. Less clutter, more formulas.

items.title: Generate with AI
items.description: Describe the topic and AI creates the full LaTeX formula sheet for you. From kinematics to organic chemistry, in seconds.

items.title: Smart search
items.description: Find any formula in seconds. Search by name, symbol, topic, or keyword and get instant results.

items.title: Chapter-based organization
items.description: Structure your formula sheets into chapters and topics. From classical mechanics to thermodynamics, everything has its place.

items.title: Built-in LaTeX editor
items.description: Write and edit formulas directly in LaTeX with real-time preview. No extra software required.

items.title: QR code sharing
items.description: Generate a QR code for every formula sheet. Perfect for printing and sharing during lessons and exams.

items.title: Private and public formula sheets
items.description: Keep your formulas private or make them available to the community. Control always stays in your hands.

items.question: How does AI create a formula sheet for me?
items.answer: Just enter the topic, for example 'Electromagnetism', and the AI instantly generates a complete structure. You get organized chapters, accurate formulas, and ready-to-use descriptions. It removes the blank-page problem so you can focus on refining the details.

items.question: I do not know LaTeX. Can I still use FormulaBase?
items.answer: Absolutely. You do not need to write any code unless you want to. The AI handles the technical formatting while you work with an intuitive editor.

items.question: How does QR code sharing work?
items.answer: Every formula sheet gets a unique QR code automatically. Before sharing, you choose the visibility: private, public with link, or community. You can print it directly or save it as an image.

items.question: What is the difference between private, public, and community?
items.answer: Private is visible only to you and is ideal for work in progress. Public with link is accessible to anyone with the link or QR code. Community appears in the public collection and can be found and duplicated by other users.

items.question: Can I edit a formula sheet created by someone else?
items.answer: Yes. If you find a useful formula sheet in the Community, you can duplicate it into your profile with one click. You will get your own copy to edit, extend, or shorten without changing the original author's work.

items.question: Is it free?
items.answer: Yes, you can start for free without a credit card. You can create formula sheets, use the LaTeX editor, and share via QR code or link right away.

cta.title: Ready to organize your formulas?
cta.description: Create your first formula sheet in under a minute with AI or from scratch. No credit card, no setup.

privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPage.subtitle: Information on the processing of personal data pursuant to Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (GDPR).

sections.title: 1. Data controller
paragraphs: The controller of personal data is the operator of the FormulaBase platform. For any request related to the processing of your data, you can contact us through the channels listed in the "Contact" section.

sections.title: 2. Data collected
paragraphs: When creating an account, we collect only the following personal data provided through the authentication provider:
We do not collect sensitive data, payment data, and we do not perform profiling for advertising or commercial purposes.
list: Display name: publicly shown to other users
Email address: used only for authentication and not visible to other users
Profile photo URL: used internally only and not visible to other users

sections.title: 3. Purpose and legal basis
paragraphs: The collected data is processed exclusively for the following purpose:
We do not process your data for purposes other than those indicated, nor do we share it with third parties for commercial purposes.
list: Account creation and management: necessary for providing the service (Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR)

sections.title: 4. Artificial intelligence services
paragraphs: The platform integrates Google Gemini as an artificial intelligence service for content generation. When you use this feature:
We recommend that you do not include personal data in prompts sent to the AI assistant.
list: Only the prompt text that you explicitly type into the dedicated field is sent to Google APIs
The content of your formula sheet is never sent to external services
We do not send identifying personal data such as email or name to Google APIs
Google's processing of data is governed by the Google Privacy Policy

sections.title: 5. Data visibility
paragraphs: Only the display name is visible to other users of the platform. Your email address and profile photo URL are processed confidentially and are never shown to other users.

sections.title: 6. Data retention
paragraphs: Data is stored for the entire lifetime of the account. If the account is deleted, personal data will be removed from our systems within 30 days, unless a different retention period is required by law.

sections.title: 7. Security
paragraphs: We adopt appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal data from unauthorized access, loss, or disclosure, in accordance with Art. 32 GDPR.

sections.title: 8. Contact
paragraphs: For any request related to this notice or the processing of your personal data, you can contact us by email.

termsPage.title: Terms of Service
termsPage.subtitle: Please read these terms carefully before using the platform.

sections.title: 1. Acceptance of terms
paragraphs: By using the FormulaBase platform, you fully accept these Terms of Service. If you do not accept them, please do not use the service.

sections.title: 2. Service description
paragraphs: FormulaBase is a platform that allows registered users to create, organize, and consult formula sheets structured into chapters and topics. The service is provided as is, without guarantees of continuous availability.

sections.title: 3. Registration and account
paragraphs: To use the service, you must create an account through a supported authentication provider. You are responsible for the security of your account and for activities carried out through it. In case of unauthorized access, you must notify us immediately.

sections.title: 4. User content
paragraphs: You are solely responsible for the content, including formula sheets, chapters, and topics, that you upload or create on the platform. It is forbidden to upload content that is:
We reserve the right to remove content that violates these terms.
list: Illegal or infringing on third-party rights

sections.title: 5. Intellectual property
paragraphs: Content created by the user remains their property. By using the service, the user grants the platform a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable license to store and deliver that content solely for the purpose of operating the service.

sections.title: 6. Limitation of liability
paragraphs: The platform is not liable for data loss, service interruptions, or damages resulting from the use or inability to use the service. The service is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind.

sections.title: 7. Account deletion
paragraphs: Users may request deletion of their account at any time. Following deletion, all personal data and associated content will be removed within 30 days, unless a different retention period is required by law.

sections.title: 8. Changes to the terms
paragraphs: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Changes will be communicated to users and will take effect from the publication date. Continued use of the service after publication of the changes constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.

sections.title: 9. Governing law
paragraphs: These terms are governed by Italian law. For any dispute, jurisdiction lies with the court of the service owner's place of residence, unless otherwise required by consumer protection law.

sections.title: 10. Contact
paragraphs: For any question regarding these terms, you can contact us by email.
